channel.title: Enterprise-Managed-Users on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Enterprise-Managed-Users on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Copilot metrics reports now return consistent usernames for Enterprise Managed Users
item.description:
Copilot usage metrics reports now return a consistent user_login value for Enterprise Managed Users. This addresses cases where reports previously included a suffixed user_login, complicating analysis.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: IP allow list coverage extended to EMU namespaces in public preview
item.description:
GitHub Enterprise Cloud now supports extending GitHub’s native IP allow list to user namespaces for Enterprise Managed Users (EMUs), available in public preview.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Spark: 🚀 Expanded access, enhanced reliability, and faster iteration history
item.description:
GitHub announced Spark is available in Public Preview for Copilot Enterprise customers, including Enterprise Managed Users (EMU) CE. Organization admins can enable Spark to provide access; the release emphasizes expanded access, improved reliability, and faster iteration history.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Enterprise access restrictions with corporate proxies is now generally available
item.description:
GitHub announced general availability of enterprise access restrictions using corporate proxies for GitHub Enterprise Cloud accounts that use Enterprise Managed Users (EMU). Enterprise owners can now enforce access controls tied to corporate proxy infrastructure to improve security and compliance for managed enterprise identities.

  • Source: GitHub
